results.title: Final Fantasy VII Remake Trilogy Finally Has an Ending: Revelation Lands Spring 2027 on PS5, Xbox, Switch 2, and PC
results.description: Following repeated teases from director Naoki Hamaguchi, the day has finally arrived. Final Fantasy VII Remake Part 3 has been officially unveiled during this year's Summer Game Fest showcase as Final Fantasy VII Revelation, the final chapter of the Unknown Journey that began in 2020. The third and final entry in the remake trilogy was announced with a first trailer that provided a first look at the Meteor threatening the world, the Weapons roaming the fields, Wutai, the Highwind airship, and the first snippets of Cid and Vincent in combat. Following the first proper reveal of Final Fantasy VII Revelation, [...]

results.title: New video shows suspect after 'Top Gun: Maverick' actor James Handy stabbed to death
results.description: Neighbors are speaking out after a veteran actor known for a recent role in “Top Gun: Maverick” was stabbed to death Wednesday in Tarzana. According to police, 81-year-old James Handy was allegedly killed by his girlfriend’s son. The suspect has been identified as 44-year-old Michael Gledhill. Newly obtained video from TMZ appears to show Gledhill [...]

results.title: 1 dead, 3 seriously injured after head-on vehicle collision in Layton, road closures in place
results.description: LAYTON, Utah (ABC4) — One person is dead and three others are seriously injured after a head-on vehicle collision in Layton. According to Layton Police Department, the crash occurred between 1800 East Oak Hills Dr. and 2250 East Oak Hills Dr. The crash reportedly involved two vehicles. One person was pronounced dead at the scene [...]
